title: lintonia nutans var. melicoides
intro: Lintonia nutans var. melicoides, also known as the "tangle flower" or "wild quinine," is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Apiaceae. The medicinal properties of Lintonia nutans var. melicoides include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to relieve fever, reduce pain and inflammation, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Lintonia nutans var. melicoides can be made into a tea, infusion, or tincture, and are often used to treat respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, as well as to aid in digestion.
